/** * Marketplace Page - Blockchain-Only Version * * Main NFT marketplace page displaying all listed NFTs. * Uses NFTGallery component for blockchain data. * No mock data - everything from smart contract. */ import React from 'react'; import { Link } from 'react-router-dom'; import { useWallet } from '../contexts/WalletContext'; import NFTGallery from '../components/NFTGallery'; import { ShoppingCart, Plus, Sparkles } from 'lucide-react'; const Marketplace = () => { const { walletAddress } = useWallet(); return (
{/* Header */}

NFT Marketplace

Discover, buy, and sell NFTs on the blockchain

Mint NFT
{/* Info Banner */}

Blockchain-Powered Marketplace

All NFTs are stored on the Sepolia blockchain. Purchases require MetaMask approval and gas fees.

{/* Wallet Connection Notice */} {!walletAddress && (

Connect Your Wallet

Connect your wallet to buy NFTs and view your collection.

Connect Wallet
)} {/* NFT Gallery */}
{/* Footer Info */}

All transactions are processed on the Sepolia testnet

Need test ETH? Visit{' '} Sepolia Faucet

); }; export default Marketplace;
